description: Daikin v11 audit buckets (snippets-audit-FINAL.md, Corporate-PreRevenue pipeline): RULES-ON = depth sections importing fact-usage-rules + chapter-final dedup; RULES-OFF = single-call prompts, no fact-usage-rules, no dedup. SUMMARIES-EXEMPT = exempt by design. Anchor family = the audit's five anchor figures (¥1bn revenue target, $2,500 unit price, $1,200 CAC, $460M SAM, 13% improvement).
